title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・沈黙を晴らす光

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Eurgh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(I can't reach her... Am I... going to lose? Even
after my sisters gave me their strength?!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: (At this rate... I will never reach that light...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Mejiro Bright's pace begins to slow, a
passionate voice reaches her ears.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Huh?! Oh, that's right. I'm Mejiro Bright. I am a
Mejiro.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(If I sink, the Mejiros sink with me. Yes! The sun is
not something that receives light, it...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: (It gives off light! So, I, with this body...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I will light the way to the Mejiro's new ideal!
Aaaaahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an instant, Mejiro Bright, who had faltered for
a moment, takes back her light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Silence Suzuka, as if affected by something,
crosses the finish line almost lifelessly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Were you watching, sisters? The Mejiros are still
going strong!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Today, I brought that light back to us! I feel so
proud...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for today. Because of you, I
was able to run to even higher heights...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I'm happy to hear that. You were incredible,
but I...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't run the way I wanted to. No, that's not
it. I knew I couldn't.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I could feel it. That the view ahead of me was
going to get swallowed up by your light.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I knew I couldn't catch up to you as I am. I tried
to shake the feeling, but it wouldn't go away...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I see. Then we shall have to race again.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. I will fix my running style once more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And I'll run for the light too, but a different one
from yours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Understood... I look forward to it, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, um... Welcome back!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Spe. I'm... I was...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was arrogant. If I had paid greater attention to
my surroundings...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah. That might be true, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Will you watch me race? I want to run against
Bright next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm back, Trainer. It was thanks to your voice that
I won.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It helped pull me back to realize something
important.
choice_data_list: You heard me? I'm so relieved.
You heard me? I'm so relieved.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this race, Mejiro Bright learned a racing
technique that rivals even Silence Suzuka's.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, there are still many other Umamusume
like Suzuka, those with the speed emblematic of
this new generation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have to prove that I can stand against them if
I'm to show the new Mejiro way to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And the best place to do that is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. The year-end Grand Prix, the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm quite excited. I'm going to make it a new day
of commemoration for the Mejiros!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright, as representative of the Mejiro
family, sets her sights on the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There, she'll have to find a way for her light to
shine through the veritable galaxy of star
Umamusume running against her.
